name: openviking-copilot
description: Long-term semantic memory for GitHub Copilot Chat, powered by OpenViking.

commands.name: recall
commands.description: Search OpenViking memory and inspect the recalled context block

commands.name: store
commands.description: Append the message body as a stored memory and force an archive

commands.name: forget
commands.description: Delete a viking:// URI from OpenViking (irreversible)

languageModelTools.name: openviking_recall
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve only previously stored OpenViking long-term memory that is relevant to the user's current coding question, task, debugging context, design decision, repository convention, personal preference, or past project history. Use this tool before answering when the prompt asks what was decided before, refers to prior work, asks about repo-specific conventions, mentions preferences, asks about dates or events, or depends on context that may have been saved outside the current chat. Do not use this tool for generic programming knowledge, questions fully answered by files already open in the workspace, simple calculations, chit-chat, or prompts that clearly do not require remembered context. The tool returns a ranked, token-budgeted <openviking-context> block with inline memory snippets and viking:// URIs that can be expanded with the OpenViking read tool when more detail is needed. Pass a concise search query containing the user's key nouns, repository names, decisions, preferences, errors, or feature names; avoid copying the entire prompt when a shorter query captures the recall need.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Retrieve relevant OpenViking memories for the current coding task.

query.description: Concise search query describing the memory, decision, preference, error, repository convention, or project history needed for the current prompt.

sessionId.description: Optional OpenViking session id to scope recall. Omit to use the current VS Code workspace session.

openviking.url.markdownDescription: OpenViking server base URL (e.g. `https://your-openviking.example.com`). Leave empty to use `~/.openviking/ovcli.conf` or the local default `http://127.0.0.1:1933`.

openviking.apiKey.markdownDescription: **⚠️ Prefer the `OpenViking: Set API Key` command** (writes to VS Code SecretStorage). Inline values here are honoured for backwards compatibility but can leak through git, settings sync, or screen sharing. The SecretStorage value, when present, takes precedence over this setting.

openviking.agentId.markdownDescription: Agent identity header (`X-OpenViking-Agent`). Defaults to `copilot-vscode` when empty.

openviking.autoRecall.markdownDescription: Inject relevant OpenViking memories at the top of each user turn.

openviking.recallLimit.markdownDescription: Maximum number of memories injected per turn.

openviking.recallTokenBudget.markdownDescription: Token budget for inline content. Items beyond the budget degrade to URI-only hints.

openviking.recallMaxContentChars.markdownDescription: Per-item character cap before content is truncated with `...`.

openviking.recallPreferAbstract.markdownDescription: Prefer the item's abstract over fetching full content (fewer round-trips, less detail).

openviking.scoreThreshold.markdownDescription: Minimum relevance score in `[0, 1]` to include a hit.

openviking.minQueryLength.markdownDescription: Skip recall for queries shorter than this many characters.

openviking.autoCapture.markdownDescription: Capture chat turns into OpenViking after each response.

openviking.captureMaxLength.markdownDescription: Reject turns whose sanitised text length exceeds this. Storing a half-truncated message is worse than skipping it.

openviking.captureAssistantTurns.markdownDescription: Include assistant turns in the capture stream. Set to `false` for user-only mode.

openviking.commitTokenThreshold.markdownDescription: Pending-token threshold that triggers a commit. Lower values produce archives faster.

openviking.resumeContextBudget.markdownDescription: Token budget for the archive overview fetched on session resume.

openviking.captureTimeoutMs.markdownDescription: HTTP timeout for the capture path (ms).

openviking.writePathAsync.markdownDescription: Detach commit dispatches into a background worker so VS Code isn't blocked on commit RTT.

openviking.bypassSession.markdownDescription: One-shot bypass: skip every recall + capture in this VS Code session.

openviking.bypassSessionPatterns.markdownDescription: Glob patterns matched against the workspace folder URI. Matching workspaces silently bypass OpenViking.

openviking.debugLogPath.markdownDescription: Override the debug log path. Empty to use the default `~/.openviking/logs/copilot-vscode-hooks.log`.

scripts.package: npm run build && vsce package --out openviking-copilot.vsix --no-dependencies
